tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web and summarise results

tools.name: hn_briefing
tools.description: Hacker News briefing with drill-down support

params.topic: string — optional topic to filter by

tools.name: create_script
tools.description: Generate a Python script and optionally schedule it

params.description: string — what the script should do

tools.name: list_scripts
tools.description: List all scripts and their cron schedules

tools.name: run_script
tools.description: Manually run a script by name

params.raw: string — script name or partial name to fuzzy-match

tools.name: add_cron
tools.description: Add or modify a cron entry for a script

params.description: string — human-readable label for the entry

tools.name: remove_cron
tools.description: Remove a cron entry for a script

tools.name: create_tool
tools.description: Create a new tool by describing it in plain English

params.description: string — what the tool should do

tools.name: memory_set
tools.description: Save a preference or fact (key: value)

tools.name: memory_get
tools.description: Retrieve a stored preference or fact

tools.name: run_shell
tools.description: Run a shell command or install a package (e.g. pip install)

params.raw: string — the exact shell command to run (not natural language)

tools.name: edit_script
tools.description: Edit or fix an existing script based on instructions

params.raw: string — script name or partial name
params.description: string — what to change or fix

tools.name: script_history
tools.description: Show recent run history for a script or all scripts

params.raw: string — script name (optional, omit for all scripts)

tools.name: rollback_script
tools.description: Restore a script to a previous version or list version history

params.description: string — version ID to restore (omit to list versions)

tools.name: restart_bot
tools.description: Restart the bot service (systemctl restart tgbot)
